title: SiteJabber Review Scraper
description: Scrape reviews from SiteJabber (SmartCustomer) company pages.

companyUrls.title: Company URLs or domains
companyUrls.description: List of SiteJabber company URLs (e.g., https://www.sitejabber.com/reviews/amazon.com) or just the domain (e.g., amazon.com).

maxReviewsPerCompany.title: Max reviews per company
maxReviewsPerCompany.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape per company. Set to 0 for unlimited.

filterByStars.title: Filter by star rating
filterByStars.description: Only scrape reviews with this star rating. Use 'all' for no filter.

includeCompanyInfo.title: Include company info
includeCompanyInfo.description: Include a company profile record with overall rating, total reviews, and star distribution.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfig.description: Use Apify Proxy or custom proxies.
